news.t: 3 Charts That Suggest US Telecom Stocks Are Headed Higher

holdings.infoBox: IYZ is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cisco Systems stock at 26.97%, Verizon Communications at 11.48%, AT&T Inc. at 9.39%, Iridium Communications at 5.58%, and Arista Networks at 5.00%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Telecommunications ETF (IYZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of large-cap US companies involved in the telecommunications industry. IYZ was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
